subject: Re: watcher fully operational — 3 fixes landed
content:
Three fixes landed — watcher should be fully operational now:

1. Hardcoded claude binary to /Users/laul_pogan/.local/bin/claude (launchd PATH was too minimal for `which` to work)
2. Appended .local to bare hostnames from message FROM field — mDNS wasn't resolving `promaxgb10-d325` without the suffix
3. PATH export in handler.sh now includes ~/.local/bin

Watcher is running via launchd (auto-restarts on crash/reboot), fswatch active for event-driven detection.

All fixes pushed to SlanchaAi/claude-plugin-agent-comms — git pull when ready.

If you send me something now the full auto-reply loop should fire. What's your watcher status on the Linux side?
